{ "name": "lodash.merge", "version": "4.6.2", "description": "The Lodash method `_.merge` exported as a module.", "homepage": "https://lodash.com/", "icon": "https://lodash.com/icon.svg", "license": "MIT", "keywords": "lodash-modularized, merge", "author": "John-David Dalton <john.david.dalton@gmail.com>", "contributors": [ "John-David Dalton <john.david.dalton@gmail.com>", "Mathias Bynens <mathias@qiwi.be>" ], "repository": "lodash/lodash", "scripts": { "test": "echo \"See https://travis-ci.org/lodash/lodash-cli for testing details.\"" } }
